medications.name: Oxandrolone Tablet
medications.description: An oral anabolic medication used only in carefully selected, short-duration protocols where recovery or lean-mass support is clinically justified.
medications.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with specific strength, recovery, or lean-mass preservation goals when liver markers, lipids, blood pressure, hormone balance, and consent requirements are monitored.

medications.name: Testosterone Cypionate in GSO
medications.dosing: EMP-321: 20 mg/ml; 5 ml; EMP-375: 50 mg/ml; 5 ml
medications.description: An injectable testosterone option used in clinician-guided hormone care to support testosterone levels when symptoms and lab results indicate a need for treatment.
medications.indication: May fit clients with low-testosterone patterns such as low libido, low motivation, fatigue, mood changes, reduced training response, or poor recovery, with individualized dosing and ongoing lab monitoring.

medications.name: BPC-157
medications.description: A research-informed recovery peptide used in wellness protocols focused on tissue repair signaling, gut-barrier support, and soft-tissue resilience.
medications.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with tendon, ligament, joint, gut-barrier, or training-recovery goals when expectations, regulatory status, and monitoring are reviewed.

medications.name: Tesamorelin/Injection
medications.dosing: VPI-39: (T1); 2500 mcg/mL; 10 ml; VPI-41: (T1); 2500 mcg/mL; 5 ml
medications.description: A GHRH analog peptide used in select protocols to support growth-hormone/IGF-1 signaling and body-composition goals.
medications.indication: May fit carefully screened clients with body-composition or recovery goals when IGF-1, glucose markers, cancer history, and route-specific monitoring are reviewed.

supplements.name: Health Essential Bundle (Multi, Vitamin D, Omega)
supplements.description: Support your health with this essential trio: Vitamin D3 + K2 for strong bones, immunity, and mood balance, a high-quality multivitamin to fill nutritional gaps, and Omega-3s for heart, brain, and anti-inflammatory support. Optimize your wellness with these foundational nutrients!
supplements.indication: Designed to support bone strength, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality.
